calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2005 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn Compelling Richard Gao To Appear At Deposition & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Philip Kilduff for plaintiff and moving party.
NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. Defendant is ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff to schedule his deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition is to be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Failure to appear at deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $411.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
